home.heroDesc: Analyze ingredients, detect contamination risks, and make informed halal food choices. Scan any food item or review E-Numbers directly with HalalHan' smart AI validator.
home.feature1Desc: Paste ingredient lists, upload labels, or simulate active camera scanning to run an instant analysis on additives, E-Numbers, and chemical compounds.
home.feature2Desc: Determine cross-contamination risks based on manufacturing conditions, shared machinery, animal enzymes, and processing methods.
home.feature3Desc: A comprehensive built-in reference directory of common food additives (E-Numbers). Filter by Halal, Haram, or Mashbooh (Doubtful) rulings.
home.quranVerse: O mankind, eat from whatever is on earth [that is] lawful and good and do not follow the footsteps of Satan. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy.

scanner.title: Ingredient Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan food labels or paste texts to analyze details.
scanner.textPlaceholder: Paste product ingredients list here... (e.g. Flour, water, whey powder, animal fat, E471, mono- and diglycerides, pork gelatin, E120)
scanner.uploadDropzone: Click or drag & drop food label image here
scanner.noScanDesc: Paste text ingredients, upload a food label photo, or run the live camera simulator to render an audit report here.
scanner.unknownRuling: Unrecognized ingredient; verified halal status could not be established.

directory.title: E-Numbers Directory
directory.subtitle: Search and inspect European food additive codes to understand their halal statuses, plant vs. animal origins, and potential health rulings.
directory.noResults: No additives found matching search criteria.

contamination.title: Cross-Contamination Auditor
contamination.subtitle: Evaluate production conditions, packaging lines, extraction methods, and logistics variables to calculate a potential non-halal cross-contamination risk index.
contamination.checklistNote: Tick any factory/processing conditions that apply:

sharedLines.title: Shared Production Lines
sharedLines.desc: Equipment is shared with non-halal products (pork/alcohol derivatives).

ethanol.title: Ethanol as Solvent
ethanol.desc: Alcohol (ethanol) used as extraction or sanitization solvent in processing.

enzymes.title: Animal Enzymes/Rennet
enzymes.desc: Sourced from unverified animal fats or enzyme processing helpers.

sharedFrying.title: Shared Frying Media
sharedFrying.desc: Frying oils are shared with bacon, ham, or non-halal items.

glazes.title: Shellac or Insect Glazes
glazes.desc: Unrefined insect secretions used for coating confectionery pieces.

risk.negligibleDesc: The selected factors indicate a safe production pipeline. Very low cross-contamination chance.
risk.negligibleTip2: Ensure halal certification body stamps match.
risk.lowDesc: Low probability of contact contamination. General operations are compliant.
risk.lowTip1: Review standard facility sanitization records regularly.
risk.lowTip2: Choose items verified by certified local councils.
risk.moderateDesc: Processing contains potential cross-contamination channels (e.g. shared lines or ethanol solvents). Moderate caution required.
risk.moderateTip1: Prefer brands with dedicated production lines.
risk.moderateTip2: Inspect manufacturer FAQs to see if lines undergo thorough ritual cleansing (Sertu).
risk.moderateTip3: Verify if alcohols used in flavor extractions are synthetic/non-khamr.
risk.highDesc: Critical cross-contamination pathways detected (e.g. shared frying mediums, animal enzymes). High probability of containing haram trace ingredients.
risk.highTip1: Avoid this item unless carrying official, audited Halal Certification stamps.
risk.highTip2: Contact manufacturers directly to ask for their third-party laboratory audits.
risk.highTip3: Look for halal alternative foods that maintain isolated fryer channels.

knowledge.title: Frequently Asked Questions
knowledge.a1: HalalHan is a premium, visual-oriented web app dashboard designed to help consumers see beyond label complexities. It processes ingredient lists, decodes confusing food additive codes (E-numbers), and calculates contamination risks on the fly so you can make informed halal food choices.
knowledge.a2:
E-Numbers are additives regulated by the European Union. They are classified into three main groups:
Halal: Plant-based, synthetic, or chemical compounds containing zero animal fat or alcohol.
Non-Halal: Sourced explicitly from pork, non-slaughtered animals, or insects like cochineal (E120).
Uncertain: Emulsifiers or fatty acids (like E471) that can be sourced from either animal fat (Non-Halal) or plant fat (Halal) depending on the factory's logistics.
knowledge.a3: An ingredient is classified as Uncertain (historically Mashbooh or Doubtful) under Islamic dietary guidelines when its exact source is unknown. For example, glycerin and gelatin can be derived from plants, fish, cows (halal if slaughtered correctly), or pigs (non-halal). Without halal certification or clear sourcing, these are classified as Uncertain.
knowledge.q4: Does the camera scan real photos?
knowledge.a4: Yes, this application features a frontend optical character recognition (OCR) simulator. You can upload an image of a food ingredient label, or cycle our high-quality sample mock labels in the camera simulation. The application reads the text and cross-references it with our E-number and ingredient database instantly.
knowledge.sidebarDesc: Islamic dietary guidelines mandate consuming only pure, wholesome food (Tayyib) which is permissible (Halal). Understanding what goes into modern processed food is key to maintaining a halal lifestyle.
knowledge.pwaDesc: Add HalalHan to your mobile home screen to quickly audit food ingredients and scan packaging while grocery shopping offline.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataStoredContent: We store your email, name, scan history and account preferences.
privacy.scanHistoryContent: Your scan history is kept locally and synced to your account if you are logged in.
privacy.accountInfoContent: Passwords are stored securely and never exposed in plain text.
privacy.contactInfoContent: We may use your email to send important updates or support messages.
privacy.userRightsContent: You can request data deletion, export, or modification anytime via the Settings page.
